message:
feat(aegis): PAC-Bayesian adaptive backpressure controller (ft-l5em3.3)

Mathematically-grounded backpressure using Gaussian posteriors over
throttle thresholds, PAC-Bayes risk bounds, sigmoid severity mapping,
EMA smoothing, starvation guard with external-cause detection, and
configurable delta/starvation_cost for operator risk tuning. 48 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
